top.title: PAAN Co., Ltd. — Opening the path to dishes yet undiscovered
top.description: Corporate site of PAAN Co., Ltd. We build MENU-PAAN, a multilingual menu translation service.
top.hero_title: Opening the path to dishes yet undiscovered.
top.hero_sub:
The dishes we wish to taste, the drinks we long for, the aromas we wish to feel, the tables we wish to touch.
The walls of language and culture between them, we shall surmount with technology and artificial intelligence.
top.news_2026_06_03_release: PAAN Co., Ltd. will be founded.
top.news_2026_06_03_product: We shall launch our multilingual menu translation service MENU-PAAN.
top.news_2026_05_10_info: Our corporate website is now live.
top.news_2026_04_18_story: On the Shinkansen home, returning from a day trip to Iwase, Toyama. The co-founders resolved to establish PAAN Co., Ltd.

mission.title: Mission | PAAN Co., Ltd.
mission.description: Opening the path to dishes yet undiscovered. Restaurants have crossed borders, but dishes have not. Through technology and AI, we bridge cultures through food.
mission.page_title: Opening the path to dishes yet undiscovered.
mission.question_h: Restaurants have crossed borders. But dishes?
mission.question_p1: Michelin, Zagat, Tabelog. ── Information about restaurants, over a century, has crossed borders. And yet — have the dishes themselves crossed?
mission.question_p2: If you cannot read the menu in Paris, you will only order what you already know. The wall of "you won't know unless you go" remains, in silence, even after the information revolution. ── Are we truly meeting the dishes we want to eat?
mission.regrets_h: The dining table holds many regrets.
mission.story1_p: You step into the restaurant from the guidebook. You open the menu. ── You cannot read it. In the end, you order ratatouille — what you know. You glance at your neighbour's plate and realise: "That. That is what I wanted."
mission.story_coda: ── A night spent before a hundred dim sum dishes in Hong Kong. Nights when one cannot find the cup one longs for. Tables that quietly give up before dietary restrictions. And the night when, for the guest from abroad who has stepped through your doorway, you cannot offer the welcome they deserve. These mismatches — we wish to challenge.
mission.approach_p1: What we confront is the lack of connection between information and people. And the lack of access to the dishes themselves.
mission.approach_p2: Through technology and AI, we shall build scene-specific matching attuned to each person's background, one product at a time. Towards a world where, through food, people meet people and cultures meet cultures, one step deeper.
mission.first_h: Our first challenge: beyond the menu.
mission.first_p1: PAAN's first product is MENU-PAAN, a menu translation service. The quiet wall of "I cannot read this" we shall lift, with AI and many languages.
mission.first_p2: Not mere literal translation, but a translation that returns to the food culture of the user's mother tongue. This is the first step of our larger vision. Pressing onward, beyond the gourmet site, we open the path to dishes yet undiscovered.

brand.title: Brands | PAAN Co., Ltd.
brand.description: Brands operated by PAAN Co., Ltd. Including MENU-PAAN, our multilingual menu translation service.
brand.menupaan_desc: A multilingual menu translation service for both international travellers and inbound visitors to Japan. From a single photograph, we deliver — in your mother tongue — culturally contextual dish explanations and automated alerts for allergies, religious requirements, and dietary restrictions. Beyond the dry literal translation of existing apps, we offer a translation rooted in the user's own food culture.
brand.menupaan_feature_langs_value: Japanese / English / Chinese (Simplified & Traditional) / Korean / Spanish / French / German / Italian / Vietnamese / Indonesian / Thai
brand.menupaan_feature_func_value: Automated menu OCR, culturally contextual dish explanations, automated alerts for allergies, religion, and dietary restrictions, pairing recommendations, ordering support
brand.menupaan_feature_form_value: Web (PWA, all devices) / iOS app (rolling out)
brand.others_desc: To reach the cup you long for, by means other than chance. To meet the dish that pairs best with the local sake. To welcome, without hesitation, the table marked by dietary restriction or conviction. And to access dishes from beyond the border, from this side of the border. — The PAAN Series, realising one by one through products the scenes set forth in our mission, shall unfold in turn.

company.title: Company | PAAN Co., Ltd.
company.description: Company information and officers of PAAN Co., Ltd.
company.biz_1_main: Planning, development, and operation of MENU-PAAN
company.biz_1_sub: 12-language SaaS for international travellers and inbound visitors to Japan
company.biz_2_sub: Stock management, order management, multilingual menus, and other operational support systems
company.biz_3_sub: SaaS selection and implementation guidance, operational design, consultation on digitalisation
company.biz_4_sub: Planning and development of products realising the next generation of dining experiences, alongside research into dish understanding, culturally contextual translation, and scene-specific matching using artificial intelligence
company.founder_inui_bio: Graduated from Keio Senior High School in 2015. After completing his Bachelor of Laws (Politics) at Keio University in 2019, he joined the Ministry of Foreign Affairs of Japan as a career-track officer. He served at headquarters covering Korea and the Philippines, and subsequently at the Embassy of Japan in the United Kingdom as Attaché and Second Secretary, engaged in external economic and diplomatic affairs. In June 2025, he left the Ministry and assumed the role of Managing Director at Kushinobou Co., Ltd., a kushikatsu specialist established in 1950. Drawing on his experience as both diplomat and restaurateur, he conceived MENU-PAAN. In June 2026, he co-founded PAAN Co., Ltd. Born July 1996.
company.founder_yui_bio: Graduated from Keio Senior High School in 2015. While studying at Keio University Faculty of Law, he passed the preliminary bar examination in 2018 and the bar examination the following year. Upon his admission to the bar in 2021 (Daini Tokyo Bar Association), he joined ZeLo Law Office, where he specialises in startup finance, public affairs, and general corporate matters, providing legal advisory rooted in both public and private sector knowledge. After serving in administrative practice at the Ministry of Economy, Trade and Industry's Innovation and Environment Bureau (Innovation Promotion Division), he is currently with Fugen Law Office. In June 2026, he co-founded PAAN Co., Ltd. Born July 1996.

contact.title: Contact | PAAN Co., Ltd.
contact.description: Contact PAAN Co., Ltd. for partnerships, press, careers, and more.
contact.lead: For business partnerships, press enquiries, careers, and other matters, please reach out via the email address below. We will respond after reviewing your enquiry.
contact.email_note: We aim to respond within three business days (Mon-Fri, excluding public holidays). For urgent matters, or if you do not receive a reply within a reasonable time, we kindly ask you to send your message again.
contact.inquiry_1_body: We welcome partnerships with restaurants, travel and tourism providers, local governments, media, and companies in the translation and AI sectors.
contact.inquiry_2_body: For press, articles, and speaking engagements, please include your outlet, scope, and proposed dates.
contact.inquiry_3_body: We are recruiting engineers, designers, business development, and operations colleagues. Please include a brief background with your enquiry.
contact.inquiry_4_body: For MENU-PAAN service usage and bug reports, please use the contact form on menupaan.com.
